/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libatframe_utils.a CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/crc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/compression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/crypto_cipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/crypto_dh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/crypto_hmac.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/murmur_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/sha.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/algorithm/xxtea.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/cli/cmd_option_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/cli/cmd_option_value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/cli/shell_font.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/demangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/demangle_cxx_abi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/demangle_windows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/file_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/platform_compat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/common/string_oprs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/config/ini_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/log_formatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/log_sink_file_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/log_sink_syslog_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/log_stacktrace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/log_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/log/lua_log_adaptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/memory/lru_object_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/memory/rc_ptr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/network/http_content_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/network/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/random/uuid_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/string/tquerystring.cpp.o CMakeFiles/atframe_utils.dir/src/time/time_utility.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libatframe_utils.a
